title: Sales Manager Vacancy at JLL India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at JLL India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
